content: [phase1-1] Add dependencies: sqlalchemy, payos, python-jose, passlib
[phase1-2] Setup db/ module: engine, models, init_db (all tables)
[phase1-3] Backend APIs: auth, categories, products, stock, orders, payment (PayOS)
[phase1-4] Update routes.py: mount all API routers + SPA fallback
[phase1-6] Start server, verify app runs, test endpoints
